en: The word of the LORD came to me:
"Son of man, set your face against Mount Seir, and prophesy against it,
zh: “人子啊！你要面向西珥山，說預言攻擊它，

en: and say to it, Thus says the Lord GOD: Behold, I am against you, Mount Seir, and I will stretch out my hand against you, and I will make you a desolation and a waste.
zh: 對它說：‘主耶和華這樣說：西珥山啊！我要與你為敵，伸手攻擊你，使你非常荒涼。

en: I will lay your cities waste, and you shall become a desolation, and you shall know that I am the LORD.
zh: 我要使你的城市變為廢墟，你必然荒涼，那時，你就知道我是耶和華。

en: Because you cherished perpetual enmity and gave over the people of Israel to the power of the sword at the time of their calamity, at the time of their final punishment,
zh: 因為你永遠懷恨，在以色列人遭遇災難，刑罰到了頂點的時候，你把他們交在刀劍之下，

en: therefore, as I live, declares the Lord GOD, I will prepare you for blood, and blood shall pursue you; because you did not hate bloodshed, therefore blood shall pursue you.
zh: 所以我指著我的永生起誓，我必使你遭受流血的報應，這血必追趕你；你既不恨惡流人的血，這血必追趕你。這是主耶和華的宣告。

en: I will make Mount Seir a waste and a desolation, and I will cut off from it all who come and go.
zh: 我必使西珥山非常荒涼，我必從那裡剪除來往的人。

en: And I will fill its mountains with the slain. On your hills and in your valleys and in all your ravines those slain with the sword shall fall.
zh: 我必使西珥的眾山布滿了被殺的人；被刀劍所殺的人必倒在你的小山、山谷和所有的溪澗中。

en: I will make you a perpetual desolation, and your cities shall not be inhabited. Then you will know that I am the LORD.
zh: 我必使你永遠荒涼，你的城市必沒有人居住；你們就知道我是耶和華。

en: "Because you said, 'These two nations and these two countries shall be mine, and we will take possession of them'- although the LORD was there-
zh: “‘因為你曾說：這兩國這兩邦都必歸我，我必得它們為業，但其實耶和華還是在那裡。

en: therefore, as I live, declares the Lord GOD, I will deal with you according to the anger and envy that you showed because of your hatred against them. And I will make myself known among them, when I judge you.
zh: 所以我指著我的永生起誓：我必照著你因仇恨而向他們所發的忿怒和嫉妒對待你。我審判你的時候，必把自己顯明在他們中間。這是主耶和華的宣告。

en: And you shall know that I am the LORD. "I have heard all the revilings that you uttered against the mountains of Israel, saying, 'They are laid desolate; they are given us to devour.'
zh: 這樣，你就必知道我耶和華聽見了你的一切毀謗，就是你攻擊以色列眾山的話，說：“這些山都已經荒涼了！已經給我們吞吃了！”

en: And you magnified yourselves against me with your mouth, and multiplied your words against me; I heard it.
zh: 你們用口說誇大的話攻擊我，說出許多話來與我作對，我都聽見了。

en: Thus says the Lord GOD: While the whole earth rejoices, I will make you desolate.
zh: 主耶和華這樣說：全地都歡樂的時候，我卻要使你荒涼。

en: As you rejoiced over the inheritance of the house of Israel, because it was desolate, so I will deal with you; you shall be desolate, Mount Seir, and all Edom, all of it. Then they will know that I am the LORD.
zh: 你怎樣因以色列家的產業荒涼而歡樂，我也必照樣待你。西珥山啊！你和以東全地都必荒涼。他們就知道我是耶和華。’”
